raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The bill SB 365 requires Medi-Cal to reimburse all participating primary care providers for e-consult services.",
    "SB 365 aims to create reimbursement equity between primary care providers and specialist providers for e-consults.",
    "The implementation of e-consults in healthcare could reduce wait times for non-urgent concerns.",
    "SB 371 addresses the technology challenges faced by physicians who lack access to Health Information Exchange (HIE) technologies.",
    "SB 371 includes various types and technologies of data exchange for physicians.",
    "SB 371 aims to reestablish the state as a key player in supporting Health Information Exchange.",
    "SB 371 seeks to leverage federal and private funding sources to support physician practices that are lagging.",
    "Expanding broadband access to underserved regions is part of the goals of SB 371.",
    "SB 371 aims to modernize the state’s public health information infrastructure.",
    "Numerous studies indicate that increases in tobacco taxes lead to reduced tobacco use among young adults.",
    "The proceeds from the tax on vaping products in SB 395 will be used for tobacco prevention and education programs.",
    "SB 409 authorizes pharmacists to perform FDA-approved tests for COVID-19 and influenza under specified conditions.",
    "The CDC acknowledges that COVID-19 and influenza sharing similar symptoms necessitates testing for accurate diagnosis.",
    "SB 409 seeks to increase efficiency by allowing pharmacists to perform CLIA-waived tests for COVID-19 and influenza."
  ]
}
```
